question_text: Design a GraphQL schema for a social media platform with users, posts, comments, likes, and follows. Address: N+1 query problem with DataLoader pattern, cursor-based pagination, proper input validatio

claude_opus_47.response:
# GraphQL Social Media Platform Schema & Implementation

A production-grade design addressing the hardest problems: N+1 queries, cursor pagination, validation, rate limiting, and subscriptions.

## 1. Schema Definition (SDL)

```graphql
# ============ Scalars & Directives ============
scalar DateTime
scalar Cursor

directive @auth(requires: Role = USER) on FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @rateLimit(
  max: Int!
  window: Int!  # seconds
  message: String
) on FIELD_DEFINITION
directive @constraint(
  minLength: Int
  maxLength: Int
  pattern: String
) on INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION | ARGUMENT_DEFINITION

enum Role { USER MODERATOR ADMIN }
enum PostVisibility { PUBLIC FOLLOWERS PRIVATE }
enum SortOrder { NEWEST OLDEST POPULAR }

# ============ Core Types ============
type User {
  id: ID!
  username: String!
  displayName: String!
  bio: String
  avatarUrl: String
  createdAt: DateTime!

  # Relations (all use DataLoader internally)
  posts(first: Int = 20, after: Cursor, sort: SortOrder = NEWEST): PostConnection!
  followers(first: Int = 20, after: Cursor): UserConnection!
  following(first: Int = 20, after: Cursor): UserConnection!

  # Aggregates (batched via DataLoader)
  postCount: Int!
  followerCount: Int!
  followingCount: Int!

  # Viewer-contextual fields
  isFollowedByViewer: Boolean!
  isFollowingViewer: Boolean!
}

type Post {
  id: ID!
  author: User!              # DataLoader batched
  content: String!
  mediaUrls: [String!]!
  visibility: PostVisibility!
  createdAt: DateTime!
  editedAt: DateTime

  comments(first: Int = 20, after: Cursor): CommentConnection!
  likes(first: Int = 20, after: Cursor): LikeConnection!

  commentCount: Int!
  likeCount: Int!
  isLikedByViewer: Boolean!
}

type Comment {
  id: ID!
  post: Post!
  author: User!
  content: String!
  createdAt: DateTime!
  replyTo: Comment
  replyCount: Int!
  likeCount: Int!
  isLikedByViewer: Boolean!
}

type Like {
  id: ID!
  user: User!
  post: Post
  comment: Comment
  createdAt: DateTime!
}

# ============ Relay-style Connections ============
type PageInfo {
  hasNextPage: Boolean!
  hasPreviousPage: Boolean!
  startCursor: Cursor
  endCursor: Cursor
}

type PostEdge { cursor: Cursor!, node: Post! }
type PostConnection {
  edges: [PostEdge!]!
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  totalCount: Int!
}

type UserEdge { cursor: Cursor!, node: User! }
type UserConnection {
  edges: [UserEdge!]!
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  totalCount: Int!
}

type CommentEdge { cursor: Cursor!, node: Comment! }
type CommentConnection {
  edges: [CommentEdge!]!
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  totalCount: Int!
}

type LikeEdge { cursor: Cursor!, node: Like! }
type LikeConnection {
  edges: [LikeEdge!]!
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  totalCount: Int!
}

# ============ Inputs ============
input CreatePostInput {
  content: String! @constraint(minLength: 1, maxLength: 5000)
  mediaUrls: [String!] = []
  visibility: PostVisibility = PUBLIC
}

input CreateCommentInput {
  postId: ID!
  content: String! @constraint(minLength: 1, maxLength: 1000)
  replyToId: ID
}

input FeedFilter {
  authorIds: [ID!]
  since: DateTime
  onlyFollowing: Boolean = false
}

# ============ Queries ============
type Query {
  me: User @auth
  user(id: ID, username: String): User
  post(id: ID!): Post

  feed(
    first: Int = 20
    after: Cursor
    filter: FeedFilter
  ): PostConnection!
    @auth
    @rateLimit(max: 60, window: 60)

  search(
    query: String! @constraint(minLength: 2, maxLength: 100)
    first: Int = 20
    after: Cursor
  ): PostConnection! @rateLimit(max: 30, window: 60)
}

# ============ Mutations ============
type Mutation {
  createPost(input: CreatePostInput!): Post!
    @auth @rateLimit(max: 10, window: 60, message: "Too many posts")

  deletePost(id: ID!): Boolean! @auth

  createComment(input: CreateCommentInput!): Comment!
    @auth @rateLimit(max: 30, window: 60)

  likePost(postId: ID!): Post! @auth @rateLimit(max: 100, window: 60)
  unlikePost(postId: ID!): Post! @auth

  followUser(userId: ID!): User! @auth @rateLimit(max: 50, window: 300)
  unfollowUser(userId: ID!): User! @auth
}

# ============ Subscriptions ============
type Subscription {
  postAdded(authorId: ID): Post!           # Follows or specific user
  commentAdded(postId: ID!): Comment!
  postLiked(postId: ID!): LikeEvent!
  notificationReceived: Notification! @auth
}

type LikeEvent {
  post: Post!
  user: User!
  lik

claude_opus_46.response:
# Social Media Platform - Complete GraphQL Schema & Implementation

## Schema Definition

```graphql
# schema.graphql

# ─── Scalars ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
scalar DateTime
scalar Cursor
scalar URL
scalar EmailAddress

# ─── Enums ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
enum PostVisibility {
  PUBLIC
  FRIENDS_ONLY
  PRIVATE
}

enum NotificationType {
  NEW_FOLLOWER
  POST_LIKED
  POST_COMMENTED
  MENTION
}

enum ReportReason {
  SPAM
  HARASSMENT
  INAPPROPRIATE_CONTENT
  MISINFORMATION
}

enum SortOrder {
  NEWEST
  OLDEST
  MOST_LIKED
  MOST_COMMENTED
  TRENDING
}

# ─── Interfaces ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
interface Node {
  id: ID!
}

interface Timestamped {
  createdAt: DateTime!
  updatedAt: DateTime!
}

# ─── Connection Types (Cursor-Based Pagination) ───────────────────────
type PageInfo {
  hasNextPage: Boolean!
  hasPreviousPage: Boolean!
  startCursor: Cursor
  endCursor: Cursor
  totalCount: Int!
}

type UserConnection {
  edges: [UserEdge!]!
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
}

type UserEdge {
  node: User!
  cursor: Cursor!
  followedAt: DateTime  # contextual edge data for follower connections
}

type PostConnection {
  edges: [PostEdge!]!
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
}

type PostEdge {
  node: Post!
  cursor: Cursor!
}

type CommentConnection {
  edges: [CommentEdge!]!
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
}

type CommentEdge {
  node: Comment!
  cursor: Cursor!
}

type NotificationConnection {
  edges: [NotificationEdge!]!
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
}

type NotificationEdge {
  node: Notification!
  cursor: Cursor!
}

# ─── Core Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
type User implements Node & Timestamped {
  id: ID!
  username: String!
  email: EmailAddress!           # only visible to self
  displayName: String!
  bio: String
  avatarUrl: URL
  coverPhotoUrl: URL
  isVerified: Boolean!
  isOnline: Boolean!
  lastSeenAt: DateTime

  # Relationships (all paginated)
  posts(
    first: Int
    after: Cursor
    last: Int
    before: Cursor
    sortBy: SortOrder = NEWEST
    visibility: PostVisibility
  ): PostConnection!

  followers(first: Int, after: Cursor, last: Int, before: Cursor): UserConnection!
  following(first: Int, after: Cursor, last: Int, before: Cursor): UserConnection!

  # Computed fields
  followerCount: Int!
  followingCount: Int!
  postCount: Int!

  # Relationship to viewer
  isFollowedByViewer: Boolean!
  isFollowingViewer: Boolean!
  isBlockedByViewer: Boolean!

  createdAt: DateTime!
  updatedAt: DateTime!
}

type Post implements Node & Timestamped {
  id: ID!
  author: User!
  content: String!
  mediaUrls: [URL!]!
  visibility: PostVisibility!
  tags: [String!]!

  # Relationships
  comments(
    first: Int
    after: Cursor
    last: Int
    before: Cursor
    sortBy: SortOrder = NEWEST
  ): CommentConnection!

  likes(first: Int, after: Cursor): UserConnection!

  # Computed
  likeCount: Int!
  commentCount: Int!
  shareCount: Int!
  isLikedByViewer: Boolean!
  isBookmarkedByViewer: Boolean!

  # Thread support
  parentPost: Post
  replyCount: Int!

  createdAt: DateTime!
  updatedAt: DateTime!
}

type Comment implements Node & Timestamped {
  id: ID!
  author: User!
  post: Post!
  parentComment: Comment          # for nested replies
  content: String!
  
  replies(first: Int, after: Cursor): CommentConnection!
  
  likeCount: Int!
  replyCount: Int!
  isLikedByViewer: Boolean!
  depth: Int!                     # nesting level (max 3)

  createdAt: DateTime!
  updatedAt: DateTime!
}

type Like implements Node {
  id: ID!
  user: User!
  post: Post
  comment: Comment
  createdAt: DateTime!
}

type Notification implements Node {
  id: ID!
  type: NotificationType!
  recipient: User!
  actor: User!
  post: Post
  comment: Comment
  message: String!
  isRead: Boolean!
  createdAt: DateTime!
}

# ─── Input Types with Validation Rules ─────────────────────────────────
input CreateUserInput {
  username: String!       # @constraint(minLength: 3, maxLength: 30, pattern: "^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$")
  email: EmailAddress!
  displayName: String!    # @constraint(minLength: 1, maxLength: 50)
  bio: String             # @constraint(maxLength: 500)
  avatarUrl: URL
}

input UpdateUserInput {
  displayName: String     # @constraint(minLength: 1, maxLength: 50)
  bio: String             # @constraint(maxLength: 500)
  avatarUrl: URL
  coverPhotoUrl: URL
}

input CreatePostInput {
  content: String!        # @constraint(minLength: 1, maxLength: 5000)
  mediaUrls: [URL!]       # @constraint(maxItems: 10)
  visibility: PostVisibility = PUBLIC
  tags: [String!]         # @constraint(maxItems: 20)
  parentPostId: ID        # for replies/threads
}

input UpdatePostInput {
  content: String         # @constraint(minLength: 1, maxLength: 5000)
  visibility: PostVisibility
  tags: [String!]
}

input CreateCommentInput {
  postId: ID!
  parentCommentId: ID     # for nested replies
  content: String!        # @constraint(minLength: 1, maxLength: 2000)
}

input FeedInput {
  first: Int = 20
  after: Cursor
  includeReposts: Boolean = true
}

input SearchInput {
  query: String!          # @constraint(minLength: 2, maxLength: 100)
  first: Int = 20
  after: Cursor
}

input ReportInput {
  targetId: ID!
  reason: ReportReason!
  description: String     # @constraint(maxLength: 1000)
}

# ─── Query ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
type Query {
  # Node interface for refetching
  node(id: ID!): Node

  # User queries
  me: User!
  user(id: ID, username: String): User
  searchUsers(input: SearchInput!): UserConnection!
  suggestedUsers(first: Int = 10): UserConnection!

  # Post queries
  post(id: ID!): Post
  feed(input: FeedInput!): PostConnection!
  trending(first: Int = 20, after: Cursor): PostConnection!
  searchPosts(input: SearchInput!): PostConnection!
  explore(first: Int = 20, after: Cursor, tags: [String!]): PostConnection!

  # Notifications
  notifications(
    first: Int = 20
    after: Cursor
    unreadOnly: Boolean = false
  ): NotificationConnection!
  unreadNotificationCount: Int!
}

# ─── Mutation ──────────

gpt54.brief_justification: Both responses are incomplete and truncated, but Response B better addresses the requested concerns with explicit directives for rate limiting, auth, validation, subscriptions, and mentions DataLoader usage more directly. Response A has broader schema coverage but fails to include the requested resolver implementations and key operational details, and it is also cut off mid-mutation section.

gemini.brief_justification: Both responses cut off before providing the requested resolver implementations, but Response A successfully included schema definitions for rate limiting, input validation directives, and subscriptions, addressing more of the prompt's constraints.

deepseek.brief_justification: Response A is more comprehensive, detailed, and addresses all requested aspects with greater depth and specificity.
